question: Which type of data was used to evaluate anomaly detection models in the 'modelevaluation' section of the paper?

options.A: Real-time data feeds from mission operations beyond Sol 3934
options.B: Summary statistics derived from Sol 3815 to Sol 3934 mission data
options.C: Data points from mission telemetry specific to Sol 3934
options.D: General telemetry data collected throughout the entire mission duration

explanation: The anomaly detection models were evaluated on mission telemetry that was part of Sol 3934, specifically classified as a data point in this context. Options B, C, and D either generalize beyond the specific Sol or incorrectly specify the type or time frame of the data used.
